zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun於1278年9月8日出生在英國斯塔福爾阿頓時，他的父親Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun31歲，母親Margery de Bohun26歲。他於1302年7月29日與Maud Mortimer在英國賀福爾維格莫結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在愛爾蘭被列為justiciar。他去世於1316年7月27日在他的家鄉享年37歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾可洛登可洛登 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun于1278年9月8日出生在英国斯塔福爾阿頓时，他的父亲Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun31岁，母亲Margery de Bohun26岁。他于1302年7月29日与Maud Mortimer在英国賀福爾維格莫结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他在爱尔兰被列为justiciar。他去世于1316年7月27日在他的家乡享年37岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾可洛登可洛登 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Verdun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places in France called Verdun. The placename is probably of Gaulish origin, deriving from ver(n) ‘alder’ + dūn ‘hill, fortress’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from Verdú in Catalonia (Spain), which has the same origin as the French name (see 1 above).
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Verdon  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Virden
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Verdun  .

variants.name: Verdon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Renaud, Sylvie.
French: habitational name from (Le) Verdon, the name of several places in various parts of France, for example in Dordogne, Gironde, and Marne. Compare   Ferdon  .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Verdun, the name of a fief in Vessey (Manche), France. Compare   Verdun  .

nameMeanings.name: Theobald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from þeud ‘people, race’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. The first element was altered under the influence of Greek theos ‘god’. This name was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun was born on 8 September 1278, in Alton, Staffordshire, England, his father, Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun, was 31 and his mother, Margery de Bohun, was 26. He married Maud Mortimer on 29 July 1302, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. His occupation is listed as justiciar in Ireland. He died on 27 July 1316, in his hometown, at the age of 37, and was buried in Croxden Abbey, Croxden, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun est né le 8 septembre 1278, à Alton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margery de Bohun, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Maud Mortimer le 29 juillet 1302, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est justiciar à Irlande. Il est décédé le 27 juillet 1316, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Croxden Abbey, Croxden, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun am 8. September 1278 in Alton, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun 31 und seine Mutter Margery de Bohun 26. Er hat am 29. Juli 1302 in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England Maud Mortimer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als justiciar in Irland aufgeführt. Er starb am 27. Juli 1316 im Alter von 37 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Croxden Abbey, Croxden, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun è nato il il 8 settembre 1278 nel Alton, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margery de Bohun, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Maud Mortimer il 29 luglio 1302, nel Wigmore, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come justiciar nel Irlanda. Morì il 27 luglio 1316, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Croxden Abbey, Croxden, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdunが1278年9月8日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアルトンで生まれた時，父Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdunは31歳，母Margery de Bohunは26歳であった。1302年7月29日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーでMaud Mortimerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。アイルランドでの職業はjusticiarと記録されている。彼は1316年7月27日に故郷で37歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアクロクスデンクロクスデン アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun(이)가 1278년 9월 8일 영국 스태퍼드실르 알턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery de Bohun(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1302년 7월 29일 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 Maud Mortimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 아일랜드에서 justiciar이었다. 그는 1316년 7월 27일 그의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 크록스든 크록스든 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.Webley Castle, Hereford, England: Croft Ambrey, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun nasceu em 8 de setembro de 1278, em Alton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Bohun, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Mortimer em 29 de julho de 1302, em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como justiciar em Irlanda. Ele faleceu em 27 de julho de 1316, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Croxden Abbey, Croxden, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Webley Castle, Hereford, England: Croft Ambrey, Herefordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun родился 8 сентября 1278 г. в местности алтон, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margery de Bohun, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Mortimer 29 июля 1302 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери.  Он работал по профессии justiciar в местности Ирландия. Он умер 27 июля 1316 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности кроксден эбби, кроксден, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun nació el 8 de septiembre de 1278, en Alton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margery de Bohun, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Maud Mortimer el 29 de julio de 1302, en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era justiciar en Irlanda. Murió el 27 de julio de 1316, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Croxden Abbey, Croxden, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
